data.body:
ROOT CAUSE CONFIRMED: Agent files at plugins/dso/agents/ are never registered where Claude Code looks. Claude Code resolves subagent_type by scanning .claude/agents/ (project-level) and ~/.claude/agents/ (user-level) — confirmed by official Anthropic plugin docs. Neither directory contains DSO agent files. dso-setup.sh has zero agent-related logic.

COMPETING FIXES:
Fix A (no safeguard file changes): Create .claude/agents/ with symlinks to plugins/dso/agents/*.md. Update each agent frontmatter 'name:' field to include dso: prefix (e.g., name: dso:completion-verifier). This preserves all skill subagent_type references unchanged. Confidence: medium (dso: prefix in name: field is untested/unconfirmed).

Fix B (requires safeguard files): Create .claude/agents/ with symlinks (filenames: completion-verifier.md, not dso:completion-verifier.md). Keep agent name: fields as-is (name: completion-verifier). Update all ~18 subagent_type references in skills/** from 'dso:completion-verifier' to 'completion-verifier'. Confidence: high (simple name matching). Risk: high (touches skills/** which is safeguarded, requires task-level authorization).

Also needed (safeguard): Update dso-setup.sh to sync agents to host project .claude/agents/ at install/update time.

ESCALATING TO USER: Fix A requires user confirmation that name: dso:completion-verifier syntax works in Claude Code. Fix B requires authorization to edit safeguarded skills/** files.
